languages.text: "Истребители ксеносов. Мы редко входим в контакт с людьми, и на то есть множество причин. Это все, что тебе достаточно знать прямо сейчас, человек".
"Destroyers of xenos. We rarely make contact with humans, and there are many reasons for that. For now, that is all you need to know, human."
languages.original_text: "Истребители ксеносов. Мы редко входим в контакт с людьми, и на то есть множество причин. Это все, что тебе достаточно знать прямо сейчас, человек".

traits.locale_text: "Destroyers of xenos. We rarely make contact with humans, and there are many reasons for that. For now, that is all you need to know, human."
"Destroyers of xenos. We rarely make contact with humans, and there are many reasons for that. For now, that is all you need to know, human."
"The kind that does not leave strangers alive. We rarely make contact with humans, and there is a reason for that, a very good reason. I'm afraid we don't have time for further conversation, human."
"Destroyers of xenos. We rarely make contact with humans, and there are many reasons for that. For now, that is all you need to know, human."
"Destroyers of xenos. We rarely make contact with humans, and there are many reasons for that. For now, that is all you need to know, human."

languages.text: 「知らない人間は殺さない。人間と接触することはほとんどない。その理由は、とても良い理由がある。人間、もう話せない」
languages.original_text: "The kind that does not leave strangers alive. We rarely make contact with humans, and there is a reason for that, a very good reason. I'm afraid we don't have time for further conversation, human."

traits.locale_text: 「知らない人間は殺さない。人間と接触することはほとんどない。その理由は、とても良い理由がある。人間、もう話せない。

languages.text: «Somos destructores de xenos. No solemos contactar con los humanos normales, por varios motivos. De momento, no necesitas saber más, human{mf|o|a}».
languages.original_text: "Destroyers of xenos. We rarely make contact with humans, and there are many reasons for that. For now, that is all you need to know, human."

traits.locale_text: «Somos destructores de xenos. No solemos contactar con los humanos normales, por varios motivos. De momento, no necesitas saber más, human{mf|o|a}».

languages.text: “异形的毁灭者。出于许多理由，我们很少与凡人接触。你现在只需要知道这些，凡人。”
languages.original_text: "Destroyers of xenos. We rarely make contact with humans, and there are many reasons for that. For now, that is all you need to know, human."

traits.locale_text: “异形的毁灭者。出于许多理由，我们很少与凡人接触。你现在只需要知道这些，凡人。”

languages.text: "Zerstörer der Xenos. Wir treten nur selten mit Menschen in Kontakt, und dafür gibt es viele gute Gründe. Mehr müsst Ihr fürs Erste nicht wissen, Mensch."
languages.original_text: "Destroyers of xenos. We rarely make contact with humans, and there are many reasons for that. For now, that is all you need to know, human."

traits.locale_text: "Zerstörer der Xenos. Wir treten nur selten mit Menschen in Kontakt, und dafür gibt es viele gute Gründe. Mehr müsst Ihr fürs Erste nicht wissen, Mensch."

languages.text: "Zenoları yok eden türden. İnsanlarla nadiren temas kurarız ve bunun birçok iyi sebebi var. Şimdilik bu kadarını bilmen yeterli insan."
languages.original_text: "Destroyers of xenos. We rarely make contact with humans, and there are many reasons for that. For now, that is all you need to know, human."

traits.locale_text: "Zenoları yok eden türden. İnsanlarla nadiren temas kurarız ve bunun birçok iyi sebebi var. Şimdilik bu kadarını bilmen yeterli insan."

languages.text: « De ceux qui ne laissent pas les xénos en vie. Nous entrons rarement en contact avec les humains, et ce, pour bien des raisons. Vous n'avez pas besoin d'en savoir plus pour le moment. »
languages.original_text: "Destroyers of xenos. We rarely make contact with humans, and there are many reasons for that. For now, that is all you need to know, human."

traits.locale_text: « De ceux qui ne laissent pas les xénos en vie. Nous entrons rarement en contact avec les humains, et ce, pour bien des raisons. Vous n'avez pas besoin d'en savoir plus pour le moment. »
